name: cli-scheduled-wake
description: An idle session has a `messages_in` row with `process_after = 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z` (long in the past) and `kind = 'task'`. A single `SweepService::run_once()` pass wakes the session; the harness then runs one turn and the runner-emitted reply is fanned out through the cli adapter.
